text.title: WCAG 2.2 Compliance Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-audit
step.action: Define scope (which templates + components are in/out).

step.name: run-automated-checks
step.action: Run axe-core / Lighthouse over each page; capture violations per SC.

step.name: manual-sc-checks
step.action: Manually verify SC that automated tools can't fully cover (3.2.6, 3.3.8).
step.decision-gate: If any SC blocked by missing context, mark not-applicable with rationale.

step.name: compute-overall
step.action: Overall = AA-conformant only if all 9 SC are pass or not-applicable.

step.name: validate-and-gate-ci
step.action: Run `validate-wcag-22-compliance.py`. Add CI gate that fails build on any new 'fail' status.
